---
title: "Session 07 teaching notes: Python 4"
session_id: session-07
event_id: null
---

## Session 7 — Pivoting, prediction, and data types

Python-Teil: Vorsichtig vorgehen (möglichst viele Studis mitnehmen)

Pivot: see `2_Pivot.py`

See `4_Python.py` (contains materials for the following sessions: TODDO: split.)

pp. 69: Prediction: `3_Predictions.py`

p.84/85: 4,5,6: homework

p.82 solution:

| Value    | Type        | To Type | Using function      | New value     |
| -------- | ----------- | ------- | ------------------- | ------------- |
| `"3"`    | **`str`**   | `int`   | **`int("3")`**      | **`3`**       |
| `"3.14"` | **`str`**   | `float` | **`float("3.14")`** | **`3.14`**    |
| `3`      | **`int`**   | `str`   | **`str(3)`**        | **`"3"`**     |
| `3.14`   | **`float`** | `str`   | **`str(3.14)`**     | **`"3.14"`**  |
| `False`  | **`bool`**  | `str`   | **`str(False)`**    | **`"False"`** |
| `"True"` | **`str`**   | `bool`  | **`bool("True")`**  | **`True`**    |
| `17.75`  | **`float`** | `int`   | **`int(17.75)`**    | **`17`**      |
| `"3"`    | **`str`**   | `float` | **`float("3")`**    | **`3.0`**     |


Proceed carefully through the Python material so that as many students as possible can follow.

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise                   | Summary                                                                                                                            | Files                                                                                                   | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | -------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------- |
|      67 | Pivot tables               | Construct insurance pivot tables with multiple grouping dimensions, totals, filters, and a bar chart.                              | `insurance.xlsx`<br>`insurance2.py`                                                                     |                      |
|   74–75 | Chipotle analysis          | Inspect the dataset; calculate orders, quantities, prices, and revenue; identify popular items; and create charts.                 | `Chipotle.csv`<br>`Chipotle.py`                                                                         |                      |
|   76–77 | Florida housing analysis   | Calculate and analyze profits, compare agencies and house characteristics, and build three predictive models.                      | `Homes_Florida.xlsx`<br>`Homes_Florida.py`                                                              |                      |
|   84–85 | Input and formula programs | Create interactive programs for circle area, currencies, geographic distance, travel time, fuel consumption, and annuity payments. | `CircleArea2.py`<br>`Currency.py`<br>`Distance.py`<br>`Traveltime.py`<br>`Fuel.py`<br>`AnnuityLoan1.py` |                      |

## Page 67 — Pivot tables

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class demo]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-demo} [`../materials/session_07/2_Pivot.py`](../materials/session_07/2_Pivot.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-demo}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/2_Pivot.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/data/insurance.xlsx`](../materials/data/insurance.xlsx){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/insurance2.py`](../materials/session_07/insurance2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/insurance2.py >}}
```

- Use `2_Pivot.py` while introducing pivoting.

## Page 69 — Prediction

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class demo]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-demo} [`../materials/session_07/3_Predictions.py`](../materials/session_07/3_Predictions.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-demo}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/3_Predictions.py >}}
```

- Use the prediction example identified in the existing notes.

## Pages 74–75 — Chipotle analysis

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/data/Chipotle.csv`](../materials/data/Chipotle.csv){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/Chipotle.py`](../materials/session_07/Chipotle.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/Chipotle.py >}}
```

## Pages 76–77 — Florida housing analysis

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/data/Homes_Florida.xlsx`](../materials/data/Homes_Florida.xlsx){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/Homes_Florida.py`](../materials/session_07/Homes_Florida.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/Homes_Florida.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-break}
☕ Break — 10 minutes
:::

## Page 82 — Type conversion

Use this solution when reviewing conversions:

| Value    | Type        | To Type | Using function      | New value     |
| -------- | ----------- | ------- | ------------------- | ------------- |
| `"3"`    | **`str`**   | `int`   | **`int("3")`**      | **`3`**       |
| `"3.14"` | **`str`**   | `float` | **`float("3.14")`** | **`3.14`**    |
| `3`      | **`int`**   | `str`   | **`str(3)`**        | **`"3"`**     |
| `3.14`   | **`float`** | `str`   | **`str(3.14)`**     | **`"3.14"`**  |
| `False`  | **`bool`**  | `str`   | **`str(False)`**    | **`"False"`** |
| `"True"` | **`str`**   | `bool`  | **`bool("True")`**  | **`True`**    |
| `17.75`  | **`float`** | `int`   | **`int(17.75)`**    | **`17`**      |
| `"3"`    | **`str`**   | `float` | **`float("3")`**    | **`3.0`**     |

## Pages 84–85 — Interactive formula programs

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/CircleArea2.py`](../materials/session_07/CircleArea2.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/CircleArea2.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/Currency.py`](../materials/session_07/Currency.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/Currency.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/Distance.py`](../materials/session_07/Distance.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/Distance.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/Fuel.py`](../materials/session_07/Fuel.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/Fuel.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_07/AnnuityLoan1.py`](../materials/session_07/AnnuityLoan1.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/AnnuityLoan1.py >}}
```

- Assign exercises 4, 5, and 6 as homework.

::: {.callout-warning title="Missing material"}
TODO: `Traveltime.py` appears in the exercise table, but it is not present in the supplied material inventory. Do not create or substitute a file until the source is located.
:::

## General teaching notes

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class demo]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-demo} [`../materials/session_07/4_Python.py`](../materials/session_07/4_Python.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-demo}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_07/4_Python.py >}}
```

- `4_Python.py` contains material for this and following sessions.

::: {.callout-note title="TODO"}
Split `4_Python.py` by session or topic in a future revision; the existing notes do not provide an exact page mapping.
:::

## Summary and announcements

- TODO

::: {.callout-tip title="Notes for improvement"}
Take notes on improvements and common questions during the session and add them to `feedback.qmd` afterwards.
:::
